programme.title: Ocean Warriors
programme.desc: Kitkatla's Coast Guard Auxiliary Search and Rescue team rush to deal with a Medical Emergency on a runaway tour boat.

programme.title: Manganinnie
programme.desc: Australia, 1830. Edward Waterman and his family arrive in a remote part of Tasmania, known at the time as Van Diemen's Land. Waterman is pressured into helping British colonial forces carry out the Black Line – enforced removal of Aborigines from land near white settlements. Aboriginal woman Manganinnie survives a Black Line raid which claims the life of her husband, Meenopeekameena.

programme.title: Stompem Ground 2022 - Karajarri Dancers
programme.desc: Karajarri dancers are from Mijil Mil Miya, 180 km southwest of Broome. Lead singer Mervyn Mulardy has revived several Karajarri traditional songs inherited from his grandfather and mother.

programme.title: On Country Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Honey, Fritto Misto & Red Wine Tart
programme.desc: Dwayne Bannon-Harrison shares a traditional dance with Mark and Derek. And in Berry, the boys visit a sustainable vineyard.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Adam and guests, chef and game harvester Ross O'Meara, and culinary travel journalist Sofia Levin are making easy autumnal dinners.

programme.title: Spartakus And The Sun Beneath The Sea
programme.desc: At the edge of the ice layer of Icelandis there may be a door leading to Arkadia. If you reach it, you have to overcome many dangers, solve many puzzles, and dare to face the terrible Arakoee.

programme.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programme.desc: The original 80s animation classic that follows a young orphan called Esteban as he searches the New World for both his father and the mysterious Cities of Gold.

programme.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programme.desc: The original 80s animation classic that follows a young orphan called Esteban as he searches the New World for both his father and the mysterious Cities of Gold.

programme.title: Chums
programme.desc: Turtles begin to appear everywhere, causing chaos, so the Chums must help the turtles find their home by the creek.

programme.title: Motown Magic
programme.sub-title: Don't Let The Joneses Get You Down And Keep On Truckin'
programme.desc: Imaginative boy Ben transforms his city by bringing colourful street art to life, armed with a magic paintbrush and the classic sounds of Motown.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters: Play It Forward
programme.desc: Wham visits an organization that supports veterans to surprise his cousin Ira with a skydiving experience.

programme.title: Garma: Celebrating 25 Years
programme.desc: Stories from Yolngu Country celebrating 25 years of Garma.

programme.title: APTN National News Weekend Edition
programme.desc: News week in review from Canada's Indigenous broadcaster APTN.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.desc: A slow TV showcase of the stunning landscapes found in Kambuwal, Guuwa and Gayiri Country.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Mekong
programme.desc: The Mekong Delta is one of the world's largest. Formed over the last 8,000 years, its different channels create amazing and unique habitats.

programme.title: Ice Vikings
programme.desc: It's officially the third highest amount of snowfall in Manitoba in the last century. Commercial fishers are plagued by deep drifts and hidden pockets of slush that can stop them in their tracks.

programme.title: Pro Bull Riding - USA
programme.desc: High-stakes bull riding. Rivalries ignite, champions rise, and every ride pushes the limits in a thrilling new season of action, danger, and determination. Tune in for pure adrenaline.

programme.title: Over The Black Dot
programme.desc: In 2026, Over the Black Dot becomes a digital-first Rugby League yarn free-flowing conversations on footy, culture and community, with panellists and guests sharing authentic Indigenous stories.

programme.title: Inside The Huddle
programme.desc: What is it like to be a footballer? Candid conversations, laughs, and insights that go beyond the game and into the outer.

programme.title: Mekko
programme.desc: Since childhood Mekko has had a reputation as a seer in his community, able to see into the future. But now, the only vision of the future Mekko ever sees is his own death.

programme.title: Keeping Hope
programme.desc: Mark Coles Smith travels to the Kimberley region in Western Australia, where he grew up, to investigate why it has the highest suicide rate in the world, especially among young indigenous men, and what can be done to restore hope.

programme.title: Big Backyard Quiz
programme.desc: Join us for some fun, some food and everyone's favourite chore, hanging up the washing in the Big Backyard Quiz.

programme.title: Nitv On The Road: Laura Festival
programme.desc: This program showcases performances by the traditional dance groups who were at the Laura Aboriginal Dance Festival 2013 with the Festival coordinator Raymond Blanco giving insight into the event.

programme.title: NITV On the Road: Mbantua
programme.desc: A weekend of Culture and Music in Central Australia.

programme.title: NITV On the Road: Mbantua
programme.sub-title: Warren H. Williams And Frank Yamma
programme.desc: A weekend of Culture and Music in Central Australia.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.desc: Slow TV is back on NITV with more beautiful Bamay. Bamay III celebrates great Australian islands and saltwater country. Sit back and relax with the healing powers of country.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.desc: Slow TV is back on NITV with more beautiful Bamay. Bamay III celebrates great Australian islands and saltwater country. Sit back and relax with the healing powers of country.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Jojo makes a Taraka Hangarua and Buzz visits a Transfer Station to see where the recycling goes. Tama, Maia and Jojo recycle their Cans, Bottles, Jars and Lids.

programme.title: Waabiny Time
programme.desc: Djinang, Look! It's a yongka, a kangaroo. And can you see the wetj, the emu full of feathers.

programme.title: Birds Eye View
programme.desc: There's a new Tui in the hood. The birds decide to investigate before noticing the Humans getting into a territory fight of their own.

programme.title: Aussie Bush Tales
programme.desc: The midday sun was hot with feral animals walking across the desert looking for water.

programme.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programme.desc: While in the village, the children try to repair the Condor, Pichu sent by Tao finds them and deliver them a message from Atanaos. He reveals that the Rajah was drugged by Ambrosius.

programme.title: Bushwhacked
programme.desc: Kayne and Kamil are heading to the Apple Island in the name of platypus population research, and to uncover a little known dangerous characteristic of this popular species.

programme.title: Motown Magic
programme.sub-title: Higher Ground And Living For The City
programme.desc: Imaginative boy Ben transforms his city by bringing colourful street art to life, armed with a magic paintbrush and the classic sounds of Motown.

programme.title: The Magic Canoe
programme.desc: Nico has a bad cold and cannot participate in the fun adventure. In the end, he realizes that imagination is a wonderful power that he can use whenever he wants!

programme.title: Spartakus And The Sun Beneath The Sea
programme.desc: Spartakus has led Tehrig to a disreputable town, hoping to find his friend Quillsinger, the bad boy poet.

programme.title: The World According To Grandpa
programme.desc: Poppy asks why bees make honey, so Grandpa spins a tale about a time when the world suddenly stopped turning.

programme.title: Chums
programme.desc: Flies With Eagles wants to make her ribbon skirt on her own, and the chums try to help her finish it in time for the big pow wow.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Mekong
programme.desc: The Mekong Delta is one of the world's largest. Formed over the last 8,000 years, its different channels create amazing and unique habitats.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: Ice Vikings
programme.desc: It's officially the third highest amount of snowfall in Manitoba in the last century. Commercial fishers are plagued by deep drifts and hidden pockets of slush that can stop them in their tracks.

programme.title: Unstaged: Archie Roach
programme.desc: Step backstage with the late Archie Roach, a legendary singer, songwriter and activist, as he reflects on the power of music and his connection to the audience.

programme.title: Pro Bull Riding - USA
programme.desc: High-stakes bull riding. Rivalries ignite, champions rise, and every ride pushes the limits in a thrilling new season of action, danger, and determination. Tune in for pure adrenaline.

programme.title: Over The Black Dot
programme.desc: In 2026, Over the Black Dot becomes a digital-first Rugby League yarn free-flowing conversations on footy, culture and community, with panellists and guests sharing authentic Indigenous stories.

programme.title: Inside The Huddle
programme.desc: What is it like to be a footballer? Candid conversations, laughs, and insights that go beyond the game and into the outer.

programme.title: On Country Kitchen
programme.desc: Mark and Derek visit a kitchen garden, help out at a goat dairy, and eat abalone burgers on the beach. Atop Cambewarra mountain, the boys hear the story of the black cockatoo.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Adam and guests, fabulous food writer Hetty Lui McKinnon and remarkable TV and podcast host Zan Rowe are in the express lane, cooking dinner with 12 ingredients or less.

programme.title: Spartakus And The Sun Beneath The Sea
programme.desc: Convinced that Arkadia is nearby and that he has no place in the city, Spartakus makes his farewell. No sooner has he left our heroes than the pirates appear and take them prisoner.

programme.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programme.desc: Esteban and his friends take a ride on the Great Condor. Initially, they struggle to pilot the bird, but they quickly discover its similarities to the Solaris.

programme.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programme.desc: Esteban is hoping to tell Kraka everything that happened on the mountain of the goddess Pacha Mama, and also show him the Great Condor.

programme.title: Chums
programme.desc: The chums discover a young loon lost in the wilderness and must work together to find her family.

programme.title: Motown Magic
programme.sub-title: Easy And Reach Out I'll Be There
programme.desc: Imaginative boy Ben transforms his city by bringing colourful street art to life, armed with a magic paintbrush and the classic sounds of Motown.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters: Play It Forward
programme.desc: Wham visits his hometown of Stone Mountain, GA, to reconnect with family, friends, and his favorite childhood teacher before inviting her and her class on a field trip to a local animal sanctuary.

programme.title: Garma: Celebrating 25 Years
programme.desc: Stories from Yolngu Country celebrating 25 years of Garma.

programme.title: Te Ao With Moana
programme.desc: A weekly current affairs show that examines New Zealand and international stories through a Maori lens.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.desc: Explores the mesmerising Hinchinbrook Island and natural attractions, such as waterfalls, national parks and walking trails that surround Cardwell.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: Tales From Zambia
programme.desc: Follow a herd of elephants from sunrise to sunset. In a valley full of life, they encounter many colourful characters. But it all changes when the drought comes.

programme.title: NITV Weather
programme.desc: Australian First Nations essential weekend weather forecasts, preparedness tips and cultural knowledge.

programme.title: Going Places With Ernie Dingo
programme.desc: Ernie meets a sculptor creating wildlife out of scrap metal and gets a tour of the region with a passionate local. Rae cruises the Clarence River with a Yaegl artist to learn how it inspires her work.

programme.title: True Colours
programme.desc: Lying on a bed in the health clinic, Brendan is being rehydrated via a drip. Bereft, Viv hovers. Nick brings the focus back to the investigation, and Brendan tells them he was with Keithy all night.

programme.title: Mad Max Beyond The Thunderdome
programme.desc: Set in a lawless, post-apocalyptic wilderness. To retrieve his camel train, hero Max enters the seedy, savage, rough-hewn precincts of Bartertown. Forced to fight for his possessions, he breaks the only rule of the city and is banished. In the desert, he is rescued by a tribe of feral children who see him as a prophesied saviour.

programme.title: This Is Ballroom
programme.desc: In Rio, LGBTQ+ youth of color recreate Ballroom culture on their own terms.

programme.title: Big Backyard Quiz
programme.desc: Our teams will sing some songs, share a meal or two and get into a heated round of Tic-Tac-Toe as they battle it out for the coveted Golden Tongs.

programme.title: NITV On the Road: Mbantua
programme.desc: A weekend of Culture and Music in Central Australia.

programme.title: NITV On the Road: Mbantua
programme.desc: A weekend of Culture and Music in Central Australia.

programme.title: NITV On the Road: Mbantua
programme.desc: A weekend of culture and music in Central Australia.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.desc: Jinibarra man BJ Murphy talks about his Country, including the Obi Obi River, and the problems it is facing.

programme.title: Bamay
programme.desc: Jinibarra man BJ Murphy talks about his Country, including the Obi Obi River, and the problems it is facing.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: The Toi Time whanau are excited about going on holiday. Maia makes a caravan to take with them and Aunty Anika sings about her Nana's farm.

programme.title: Waabiny Time
programme.desc: In Noongar Boodgar, Noongar Country there's so much to see. Wano, this way the djet, the flowers and ali bidi, that way you can see the boorn, the trees. Moorditj!

programme.title: Birds Eye View
programme.desc: The birds notice a billboard for a chicken restaurant. Have chickens launched their own branded eatery? When they discover the grim truth they set their minds to vengeance.

programme.title: Aussie Bush Tales
programme.desc: The children sat in the mia-mia waiting for rain to stop, it had been raining caterpillars. When the sun came out, they all decided to go catch a fish in the billabong.

programme.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programme.desc: The fort is taken by assault from all sides: the villagers, Tao and Atanaos are freed. Esteban manages to inject the antidote to the Raja who regains his spirits and realizes the betrayal of Ambrosius.

programme.title: Bushwhacked
programme.desc: Kayne and Kamil are on a journey to the Epping Forest National Park in central Queensland to meet the once thought extinct, but still critically endangered, Hairy-Nosed Wombat.

programme.title: Motown Magic
programme.desc: On a mission to find his special talent for a school project, young Ben finds a magical paintbrush and opens the door to another world.

programme.title: The Magic Canoe
programme.desc: Julie sees Viola hugging Pam and calling her her little treasure. She imagines that her aunt prefers Pam!

programme.title: Spartakus And The Sun Beneath The Sea
programme.desc: Bob and Rebecca are convinced they have found the cave where it all started. Did they come back to their village? They try to return home but the village they explore is not exactly the same.

programme.title: The World According To Grandpa
programme.desc: Louie asks why parrots are so colourful and Grandpa tells him a tale about a toy-maker who is told by her boss to invent the best toy in the whole world.

programme.title: Chums
programme.desc: A human girl on Turtle Island befriends a rabbit, a beaver, a ptarmigan as they help a fallen eaglet get back to her nest. They become the \.

programme.title: Tales From Zambia
programme.desc: Follow a herd of elephants from sunrise to sunset. In a valley full of life, they encounter many colourful characters. But it all changes when the drought comes.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: Going Places With Ernie Dingo
programme.desc: Ernie meets a sculptor creating wildlife out of scrap metal and gets a tour of the region with a passionate local. Rae cruises the Clarence River with a Yaegl artist to learn how it inspires her work.

programme.title: Mad Max Beyond The Thunderdome
programme.desc: Set in a lawless, post-apocalyptic wilderness. To retrieve his camel train, hero Max enters the seedy, savage, rough-hewn precincts of Bartertown. Forced to fight for his possessions, he breaks the only rule of the city and is banished. In the desert, he is rescued by a tribe of feral children who see him as a prophesied saviour.

programme.title: Unstaged: Archie Roach
programme.desc: Covers the electric world of freestyle dance as Maggie 'Madfox' Chen and Daisuke 'Dai' Benson prepare for City Sessions at the Sidney Myer Music Bowl.
